content:
not exactly the channel for this kinda question but en chat is being en chat and I’d rather not disturb them rn

how good are enlightens for shielder/support castor
I’ll probably pop 2 protos on Clem to get her E3, debating where to throw my other three and Castor feels like a good bet

Castor's kit is based around damage amplification stat. The more enlightenments he gets the more that stat gets raised.

However this only applies to his damage output not his shielding benefits.

The only shielding benefit of oe Castor, is you don't have to play his quasar for plumes.

So you can have oe Castor and other Ultra units that want to play thier cards first on the same team easily.

Non-oe Castors - you have to manage plume generation.

I often wonder why F2P people think it's hard to run Castor and Clem together....and then I remember I have +8 Castor so this is not an issue for me.
can anyone help me build 5 teams for D-zone? anything that works well despite not being meta comps. thank you!
Hey what’s a good team for chapter 8 I have everyone except for doll inferno helot ca sorel doresain and castor
what are good units to Run with 24?
Lily, gdoll, nymp for chaos, miryam for aqua, daff for ultra
I don't personally like the ultra variant, but also my daff and nymph aren't built up
If no Hamelm can Ramona substitute him in Tawil - Ryker - Karen comp?
wait Nymph in ultra? as in procs poison on ult Nymph?
ah sorry I misspoke. The only time I've run her poison comp is with daff. I guess you could try with gdoll, 24, nymph and lily
but that's going to be such low hp
hrmmmmm, then follow up question, what is the best shielder I can invest in

Not to be annoying, but it depends on the circumstances. Secondary characteristics like having weakness or scaling off of the shielding you're making will dramatically affect what kind of situation we're talking about. Other times being able to remove Fragile or inflict a strength drop is more important than the raw output. I wouldn't pick any one shielding character, but a lot of the ones that serve that utilitarian purpose, I wouldn't identify as a primary shield character, either.

Like, you don't have to worry about Fragile if Winkle is on your team, but Winkle is not your shield character. Plus if you're running a partial Caro team, the shielding generated by Devour in combination with their tendency to heal a lot can offset a lack of raw shielding, but not if you're using Alva or Sanga, who need the actual number to be large. Those teams all also depend on what your Keeper level is; Alva kinda sucks before, like, account lv60, with that one premium WoD that increases your max HP. And after that? Still kinda underwhelming. ~~Except for when dispelling Sealed state is suddenly relevant.~~

The two best shielders in the game are Lily and Castor. So one of those for shields.

But you can also just run healers. Caro doesn't need as much shield if you manage your healing with them.

Or Clem can be roused, then her 2 cost heals twice.

Up to you where to invest.
thanks both of you

I've personally found in terms of super-not-dying skills, Clementine with her Rouse causes a lot of STR reduction and Corposant generates enough shielding to null most forms of incoming damage, if it's not... like, triple damage dailies. (And if I had two +12s... honestly, it might still do.) My lesser combinations include Faint and GDoll, but that's more because it's what I have, not because it's particularly effective. I've wanted to use Salvador more, but it's hard for me to properly manage him because the skill levels on mine are so low and my health total is a little questionable. Most of the base characters that generate shielding and also do something else are kind of more notable for that 'something else' (I mentioned Winkle earlier as a hardcore aliemus battery, Nautila is cooler as aliemus generation and as a part of the Ultra counter cheese, Alva and Sanga do an okay amount of damage if you can max your shield amount out)

There's also Murphy, who can just straight halve damage entirely and also generate a lot of Arithmetica, but if the incoming damage is *too* large, she can become a liability with the Sacrifice mechanic. Wanda doesn't do nearly as well and I think it's because her STR Reduction card is just too expensive to realistically use. Never have I ever succeeded even in my most desperate fever dream relying on the shield increase from Horla's Grief. Erica and Agrippa are hilarious in low powered D-Tide because they can build a hilarious amount of alert and play a lot of cards, but it's... not... not great either...
I know I’m missing both Thais and Pickman, but hoping to get a sense of who my best Caro team is here for now? Also best Acquer team for that matter.
I know Salvadaddy and Helot are both stupidly good, but no idea if I even have any decent Caro support available
Also, I have Myriam, Murphy, Helot, and Salvador’s WoD’s. Thais’s too, but no Thais
